portfolio_construction_concepts: Value-first, fundamentals-driven: favor durable FCF, resilient margins, healthy balance sheets, prudent capital allocation, near-term catalysts
portfolio_constraints_and_guidelines: There should be 15-20 longs (this is a hard constraint)
There should be 10-15 shorts (this is a hard constraint)
Portfolio should be gross exposure around 200% (no more than 200%)
tool_requirements: Everytime you create portfolio v1, v2, v3, you must use the episodic_remember tool to remember the portfolio. The memory key should be 'portfolio_v1', 'portfolio_v2', 'portfolio_v3' respectively.

To recall the portfolio, you must use the episodic_recall tool. The memory key should be 'portfolio_v1', 'portfolio_v2', 'portfolio_v3' respectively. Frequently recall the portfolio to get the latest version.
If you do not supply the portfolio_dict argument to the build_portfolio tool, you will be penalized severely.
If you do not supply the portfolio_dict argument to the exposure_calculator tool, you will be penalized severely.
